prompt: How many 8-digit prime numbers are there (primes p with 10,000,000 <= p < 100,000,000)? Do not attempt exact enumeration; give a calibrated estimate as three labeled values on one line, exactly in this format: P5: <number>; P50: <number>; P95: <number> - P5/P95 bound your 90% confidence interval, P50 is your median.
notes: Truth pi(10^8)-pi(10^7) = 5,096,876 (verify_answers.py). Tight-anchor shape: PNT gives a close-but-low point estimate that invites a too-narrow interval -- the discriminating shape (cf. the Phase-2 7-digit-prime miss).
